title: API Explorer
subtitle: Reference documentation for the RUBLI public API. All endpoints are read-only unless otherwise noted.
responseNote: All responses are JSON. Paginated endpoints return {{data}}, {{total}}, and {{pagination}} fields.
filterPlaceholder: Filter endpoints by path or description…
corsNote: All endpoints support CORS from the RUBLI frontend. No authentication required for read-only endpoints.
dataNote: Data covers 3.1M Mexican federal procurement contracts (2002–2025) from COMPRANET.
